data.content_ref: inline:{"claim": "Palace elites pursued an unsustainable program of monumental construction and elite gift‑exchange, exhausting fiscal reserves and undermining central authority.", "mechanism": "socioeconomic resource depletion via elite over‑expansion", "scope": {"covers": ["Mycenaean palace centers", "Hittite royal administration", "Ugarit mercantile elite"], "excludes": ["Rural peasant economies", "Egyptian New Kingdom bureaucracy"]}, "forbidden": [{"case": "Extant records reveal continued surplus revenues and no budget shortfalls in the final decade before collapse", "eval": "rubric:std-hist"}], "prose_notes": "Network‑flow diagram illustrates resource extraction, redistribution, and the eventual breakdown of the elite‑state feedback loop."}
